// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

using global::FluentCommand.Extensions;

namespace TestModels
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for FluentCommand
    /// </summary>
    public static partial class OrderDataReaderExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Executes the command against the connection and converts the results to <see cref="T:global::TestModels.Order"/> objects.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dataQuery">The <see cref="T:FluentCommand.IDataQuery"/> for this extension method.</param>
        /// <returns>
        /// An <see cref="T:System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1" /> of <see cref="T:global::TestModels.Order"/> objects.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<global::TestModels.Order> Query<TEntity>(
            this global::FluentCommand.IDataQuery dataQuery)
            where TEntity : global::TestModels.Order
        {
            return dataQuery.Query<global::TestModels.Order>(
                factory: OrderDataReaderExtensions.OrderFactory,
                commandBehavior: global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SequentialAccess |
                                 global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SingleResult);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Executes the query and returns the first row in the result as a <see cref="T:global::TestModels.Order"/> object.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dataQuery">The <see cref="T:FluentCommand.IDataQuery"/> for this extension method.</param>
        /// <returns>
        /// A instance of <see cref="T:global::TestModels.Order"/>  if row exists; otherwise null.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::TestModels.Order? QuerySingle<TEntity>(
            this global::FluentCommand.IDataQuery dataQuery)
            where TEntity : global::TestModels.Order
        {
            return dataQuery.QuerySingle<global::TestModels.Order>(
                factory: OrderDataReaderExtensions.OrderFactory,
                commandBehavior: global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SequentialAccess |
                                 global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SingleResult |
                                 global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SingleRow);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Executes the command against the connection and converts the results to <see cref="T:global::TestModels.Order"/> objects.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dataQuery">The <see cref="T:FluentCommand.IDataQueryAsync"/> for this extension method.</param>
        /// <param name="cancellationToken">The cancellation instruction.</param>
        /// <returns>
        /// An <see cref="T:System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1" /> of <see cref="T:global::TestModels.Order"/> objects.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<global::TestModels.Order>> QueryAsync<TEntity>(
            this global::FluentCommand.IDataQueryAsync dataQuery,
            global::System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
            where TEntity : global::TestModels.Order
        {
            return dataQuery.QueryAsync<global::TestModels.Order>(
                factory: OrderDataReaderExtensions.OrderFactory,
                commandBehavior: global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SequentialAccess |
                                 global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SingleResult,
                cancellationToken: cancellationToken);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Executes the query and returns the first row in the result as a <see cref="T:global::TestModels.Order"/> object.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dataQuery">The <see cref="T:FluentCommand.IDataQueryAsync"/> for this extension method.</param>
        /// <param name="cancellationToken">The cancellation instruction.</param>
        /// <returns>
        /// A instance of <see cref="T:global::TestModels.Order"/>  if row exists; otherwise null.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<global::TestModels.Order?> QuerySingleAsync<TEntity>(
            this global::FluentCommand.IDataQueryAsync dataQuery,
            global::System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
            where TEntity : global::TestModels.Order
        {
            return dataQuery.QuerySingleAsync<global::TestModels.Order>(
                factory: OrderDataReaderExtensions.OrderFactory,
                commandBehavior: global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SequentialAccess |
                                 global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SingleResult |
                                 global::System.Data.CommandBehavior.SingleRow,
                cancellationToken: cancellationToken);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// A factory for creating <see cref="T:global::TestModels.Order"/> objects from the current row in the specified <paramref name="dataRecord"/>.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dataRecord">The open <see cref="T:System.Data.IDataReader"/> to get the object from.</param>
        /// <returns>
        /// A instance of <see cref="global::TestModels.Order"/>  having property names set that match the field names in the <paramref name="dataRecord"/>.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::TestModels.Order OrderFactory(this global::System.Data.IDataReader dataRecord)
        {
            if (dataRecord == null)
                throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(dataRecord));

            int v_id = default!;
            string v_number = default!;

            for (var __index = 0; __index < dataRecord.FieldCount; __index++)
            {
                if (dataRecord.IsDBNull(__index))
                     continue;

                var __name = dataRecord.GetName(__index);
                switch (__name)
                {
                    case "Id":
                        v_id = dataRecord.GetInt32(__index);
                        break;
                    case "order_number":
                        v_number = dataRecord.GetString(__index);
                        break;
                }
            }

            return new global::TestModels.Order
            {
                Id =  v_id,
                Number =  v_number
            };
        }

    }
}
